title: ItsJustABackpack
description: well uhh, its a mod, that uhh, adds a backpack... which gives you like storage space and stuff...
body:
**This is a simple Backpack mod for Neoforge created by yours truely (dornick_)**
a backpack can be crafted using 7 leather 1 iron and 1 chest, when opening a backpack has 27 slots meaning it can hold 1,728 items (or if you include shulkers 46,656 items)

![backpack crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a224d4c154338bd203ac73bc8dd591ce882201a0.png)
